comment_text.sn37.25:1.5: “Self-assurance” is a quality of the Buddha (SN 7.18:6.4) and a virtuous layperson (AN 5.172).

root_text.sn37.25:1.4: imāni kho, bhikkhave, pañca mātugāmassa balāni.
root_text.sn37.25:1.5: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahi balehi samannāgato mātugāmo visārado agāraṁ ajjhāvasatī”ti.

translation_text.sn37.25:1.1: “Mendicants, there are these five powers of a lady.
translation_text.sn37.25:1.3: Attractiveness, wealth, relatives, children, and ethical behavior.
translation_text.sn37.25:1.4: These are the five powers of a lady.
translation_text.sn37.25:1.5: A lady living at home with these five qualities is self-assured.”
